title: The Language School — Books Catalog
description: Curated catalog of books by Mr. David E. Stevens III, organized by language and TLS teaching level. Amazon is the purchase source; this file controls how books appear on the website.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema file. Use: ./books-data.schema.json

sections.description: Top-level groupings by target language. Typically two entries: english and spanish.

Meta.description: Page-level metadata for the books catalog.

title.description: Page heading shown on the books page.
examples: Books by David E. Stevens III

subtitle.description: Optional tagline under the page heading.
examples: Conversation-based workbooks aligned with The Language School levels.

author.description: Author name as it should appear on the site.

amazonAuthorUrl.description: Canonical Amazon author store URL. Used for a fallback 'View all on Amazon' link.

lastUpdated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this catalog was last reviewed or edited.

Section.description: A language section containing TLS levels and their books.

id.description: Stable slug for the section. Use lowercase with hyphens.

title.description: Display heading for this language group.

description.description: Optional intro paragraph shown above the level groups in this section.

levels.description: TLS teaching levels within this language, ordered from beginner to advanced.

Level.description: A TLS course level and the books that support it.

id.description: Stable slug unique within the catalog. Prefer {language}-level-{number}.

number.description: TLS level number used for sorting and labels.

title.description: Display label for the level heading.

description.description: Optional short blurb describing what students learn at this level.

books.description: Books assigned to this TLS level. Leave as [] if no book exists yet for this level.

Book.description: A single published book. Populate from Amazon, then curate TLS-specific fields (level, description, cover path).

id.description: Stable slug unique across the entire catalog. Prefer lowercase title words or ASIN.

title.description: Book title exactly as it should appear on the site (may differ slightly from Amazon).

subtitle.description: Optional secondary line under the title (edition, level hint, series name).

description.description: Short student-friendly summary for the book card (1–3 sentences). Write for TLS students, not copied verbatim from Amazon.

longDescription.description: Optional longer text for an expanded detail view or modal. Omit if not needed.

series.description: Optional series or collection name if the book belongs to one.
examples: 5 Easy Steps to Speak Spanish with Confidence

seriesOrder.description: Optional position within a series (1 = first book).

audience.description: Primary audience. Default mentally to 'student' if unclear.

formats.description: Available purchase formats. Extract from Amazon listing.

asin.description: Amazon Standard Identification Number (10 characters, often starts with B for books). Primary stable Amazon product ID.

isbn13.description: ISBN-13 if available (13 digits, hyphens optional).

amazonUrl.description: Direct Amazon product URL for the primary format (usually paperback or Kindle). Use https://www.amazon.com/dp/{ASIN} when possible.

coverImage.description: Site-relative path to a locally hosted cover image. Download from Amazon and save under img/books/. Omit until the image file exists.

coverImageAlt.description: Accessible alt text for the cover. Usually: 'Cover of {title}'.

pageCount.description: Number of pages if listed on Amazon.

languageOfInstruction.description: Language the book is written in (not the language being taught). 'bilingual' for dual-language materials.

tags.description: Optional keywords for filtering or future search (e.g. conversation, grammar, travel).

featured.description: If true, the renderer may highlight this book (e.g. top of level or hero placement). Default false.

buyLinks.description: Optional additional purchase links beyond Amazon.

BuyLink.description: A secondary retailer or format-specific purchase link.

url.description: Full URL to the product page.

meta.title: Books by David E. Stevens III
meta.subtitle: Workbooks organized by The Language School level.
meta.author: Mr. David E. Stevens III

sections.title: English Books
sections.description: Books for Spanish speakers learning English, aligned with TLS English levels.

levels.title: Level 1 — Beginner
levels.description: Start speaking English from your first lesson.

books.title: Let's Start Talking!
books.subtitle: English Level 1
books.description: A conversation-first workbook for true beginners. Practice real dialogues from day one.
books.coverImageAlt: Cover of Let's Start Talking! English Level 1

sections.title: Spanish Books
sections.description: Books for English speakers learning Spanish, aligned with TLS Spanish levels.

books.title: 5 Easy Steps to Speak Spanish with Confidence
books.description: Build practical Spanish speaking skills through guided conversation exercises.
books.series: 5 Easy Steps to Speak Spanish with Confidence
